title: Multi-Chain NFT Gallery
description: Discover and display every NFT a wallet holds across all chains in one gallery — scan with getAddressActivity then fetch NFTs per active chain.
useCase: Build a cross-chain NFT gallery that shows all NFTs a wallet holds on every chain — Ethereum PFPs, Base collections, Polygon gaming assets — in a single responsive grid.

keyParams.walletAddress: 0x wallet address to discover NFTs for across all chains
